sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 154:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 154:1
items.html: When illumination of GAR expands to the vessel of Hod, the light of Yesod returns to it, which is the phase of VAK of that light. (There)
